title: saussurea delavayi var. delavayi
intro: Saussurea delavayi var. delavayi, also known as Snow lotus or Yumei, is a plant species native to the high-altitude meadows of the Tibetan Plateau. It has been traditionally used in Tibetan medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In traditional Tibetan medicine, Saussurea delavayi var. delavayi is often prepared as a herbal tea or used in combination with other herbs for its medicinal purposes.
